01 / About

Business awareness backed by growing technical depth.

Rene is pursuing a BBA at Baruch College's Zicklin School of Business with an intended degree in Computer Information Systems and a Data Analytics track. His experience spans AWS sales coordination, technical mentorship, transportation dispatch, and professional development.

Across these roles, he has worked with client requirements, AWS cloud solutions, Salesforce, Python, Excel, regression models, customer communication, and operational recordkeeping.
